subcodes.first_line: O dearly-loved daughter! Thy letter was received. Although during the years of grievous warfare correspondence was interrupted, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز نامه تو رسید هر چند در سالهای حرب شدید مکاتبه منقطع بود ولی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love and unity
